title: Zoro Advances Through the Plateau
description: Pages 6–10 focus on zoro advances through the plateau, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the active characters in this part.
scene: This part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7 as zoro, Bartolomeo, Robin, Rebecca, and the others advance through the plateau while Doflamingo's officers try to stop them.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I know exactly how you feel,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Is worth betting our lives on!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: I won't let you lay a hand on Luffy!

dialogue.speaker: Sabo
dialogue.text: ACACIA, DRESROSA. SABO vs. Admiral FUITORA

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: There's no way we can go after the straw hats with all this commotion!

dialogue.speaker: Marines
dialogue.text: You're quite a strange one... your objective is to stop the Marines, is it not?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: How long do you intend to play the fool?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Oh dear ...you've caught me, it seems.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: If I can't get you to sympathize with me even a little, well...

dialogue.speaker: Sabo
dialogue.text: My my... the revolutionary army's second-in-command certainly isn't all talk!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: Sadly, I too have a title and whatnot to maintain... I'm sure you, of all people, understand.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: I must get you to at least be this serious!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #26
dialogue.text: What the hell is he plotting!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #28
dialogue.text: You must be prepared to risk your own neck.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #30
dialogue.text: The game is over before it even begins!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #32
dialogue.text: No way! I don't want to fight this guy!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #38
dialogue.text: Haven't you come to kill me!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #40
dialogue.text: You sold seats for us but you've long outlived your useful- Ness!!

summary: Zoro Advances Through the Plateau develops the chapter's Dressrosa conflict through Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, while preserving the OCR dialogue and keeping unclear speakers readable.
